title: User
content:
# User

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### list_users(username: Optional[Sequence[str]], email: Optional[Sequence[str]], name: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.UserItem], responses.UsersListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Users and its parameters. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.users.read`.


### get_user_me(_dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.UserMeGet

Get Current User


### list_user_settings(names: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.UserSetting], responses.UserSettingsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of User Settings and its parameters. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### delete_user_settings(setting_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing User Setting. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.
